core_mechanism: a noise-driven escape / first-passage process for an angular degree of freedom under a competing deterministic drift, producing intermittent memoryless (Poissonian) flip events whose inter-event-time distribution has a universal exponential tail and whose distribution widths and tail rate scale as power laws of a single dimensionless drift-to-noise control parameter
brief_reason: The abstract reports strongly non-Gaussian orientation-angle PDFs and a universal exponential tail in the tumbling-time PDF that scales with the single control parameter Wi, which is the signature of a stochastic drift-versus-noise escape process generating memoryless flip events.
